faq.title: FAQ
faq.q0: What devices does the Mingrun Tech AI Earphone support?
faq.a0: Currently supports the Mingrun Tech capsule case series. More device support coming soon.
faq.a1: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Offline mode processes everything locally.
faq.q2: How long do training jobs take?
faq.a2: Depends on dataset size. Typical jobs run 5–30 minutes. Track progress in the console in real time.
faq.a3: Visit the Demo page to try core features for free — no sign-up required.
faq.a4: Yes. Once a model is deployed to the device, core inference works fully offline. Cloud sync only happens when connected.
faq.q5: How do I get the hardware?
faq.a5: The product is currently in closed beta. Join the waitlist and we'll invite you in order. Watch the Updates page for the launch date.
faq.a6: The platform interface supports Chinese and English. The AI model's language capabilities depend on its training data.
faq.a7: Studio and above plans include a RESTful API. Documentation will be published at launch.
